title: Affirm Holdings Q4 Earnings: Key Metrics Overview
text: Affirm Holdings Q4 Earnings: Key Metrics Overview. Affirm Holdings (AFRM) delivered strong Q4 results for the quarter ended June 2024, with revenue reaching $659.19 million, marking a 47.9% year-over-year increase. The company achieved an EPS of -$0.14, a significant improvement from -$0.69 in the prior year. Performance vs. Expectations: The earnings report exceeded analyst projections on multiple fronts. Revenue beat: Reported $659.19 million versus the consensus estimate of $599.5 million, representing a surprise of +9.96%. EPS beat: Delivered an EPS surprise of +68.89% with consensus expectations of -$0.45. Key Operating Metrics: Notable performance highlights included. GMV: $7.241 billion outperformed the $6.871 billion estimate. Interest income: $337.62 million versus $325.66 million projected, showing +57.2% change year-over-year. Gain on loan sales: $69.98 million compared to $42.87 million estimated, representing +116.5% change annually. Merchant revenue: $181.01 million exceeded the $166.60 million estimate. Market Performance: Affirm shares gained 18.4% over the preceding month, outpacing the broader S&P 500's 3.2% return. The stock currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) rating.
